# PR Title: [Example: FEAT: Add character detail view]

## Summary of Changes

A brief and direct description of the changes introduced in this Pull Request.

---

## Related Issue

Indicate the issue number or task this PR resolves. This will automatically close the issue upon merge:

* Closes # [Issue Number Here]

---

## Type of Change

Check the option that best describes the nature of this change:

* [ ] `FEAT`: A new feature or capability.
* [ ] `FIX`: A bug fix or correction.
* [ ] `REFACTOR`: Code changes that neither add features nor fix bugs (e.g., restructuring).
* [ ] `DOCS`: Documentation changes only.
* [ ] `CHORE`: Maintenance tasks (config, dependencies, build process).

---

## Visual Proof (Screenshots/Video)

**Crucial for frontend changes.** Provide visual proof (screenshots, GIFs, or video links) of the implemented feature or fix, showing both the expected behavior and mobile responsiveness if applicable.

[Add screenshots, GIF, or video link here]
